'''Antmuel VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the sixth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="HR" /> within the [[Antmuel system/Legends|Antmuel system]], a part of the [[Chopani sector/Legends|Chopani sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="Region" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

Antmuel VI was the site of the [[Ch'hosk Cave Drawings]] that were discovered by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Archaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologist]] [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Angrail Ryhl]] at some point during his career. That discovery was later considered to be a remarkable find.<ref name="HR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Antmuel VI was first mentioned in the [[1995]] [[West End Games]]' sourcebook ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'', written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Rick D. Stuart]].<ref name="HR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Antmuel [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Antmuel VI, in grid square M-3.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
